issues.title: Move methodology docs out of the Instance repo root
issues.description: Stamped docs (CONTEXT.md, PHILOSOPHY.md, PROCESS.md, TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md, schemas/) clutter a host project's root and can collide with existing files. Decide a namespaced location, update template/, cli.js, and every cross-reference (SKILL.md, agent defs, README). The restored ADR location (PRD-001) rides on this outcome.
issues.notes: Raised by Team Lead during the Setup Grill dogfood. Decision resolved by ADR-0002 (.excn/adr/0002-excn-namespace.md, alignment PASS); implementation superseded by PRD-003 issue set EXEC-018…022.

issues.title: Restore ADR policy across framework docs
issues.description: Remove every 'no ADRs' statement (principles, template PROCESS, root PROCESS, CONTEXT Lifecycle entry, TEAM_DIRECTIVE Don'ts). Write the decision-record split into PROCESS and Principles: ADRs record hard-to-reverse decisions at grill time (criteria: hard to reverse, surprising, real trade-off); the retro remains the sprint-time record. ADR location = methodology namespace, resolved by EXEC-001; ADRs are committed markdown (understanding, not adherence). Acceptance: no doc contradicts the policy; alignment gate passes the sweep; Src-First order observed.
issues.notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 3, 5, 6, 14. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-1).

issues.title: JSON-native work artifacts: prd.schema.json + issue schema extension
issues.description: Author prd.schema.json (problem, solution, user stories, implementation/testing decisions, out-of-scope, linked issues, status). Extend issue.schema.json: prd linkage field, structured acceptance_criteria, slice_type (HITL/AFK). Convert PRD-001 from markdown to conformant JSON. Line to encode: artifacts agents execute against are JSON; documents humans read for context are markdown. Acceptance: schemas parse; PRD-001.json validates; root schemas/ mirrored from src/.
issues.notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 8, 9. Biggest structural change per Team Lead. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-2; the owner-field schema gap observed at assignment is retro-logged).

issues.title: Philosophy-scan subagent in the Setup Grill
issues.description: Before the philosophy question, the Setup Skill spawns a read-only subagent to sweep the target codebase (readmes, contributor docs, configs, prior documentation) and return philosophy candidates. Candidates are presented as confirmable proposals; the scan never writes PHILOSOPHY.md. Acceptance: a scratch run against a codebase with existing conventions surfaces at least its documented ones as proposals.
issues.notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 1, 2. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-3); acceptance verified by invocation against terminal-game.

issues.title: Complete the deviation catalog: run grill-with-docs against a scratch Instance
issues.description: to-prd and to-issues deviations are cataloged in PRD-001 Further Notes. Run grill-with-docs through a real Work Grill on a scratch Instance and file every structure mismatch (docs/adr hardcode, CONTEXT-MAP convention, anything new) as an issue. Acceptance: each mismatch is one backlog issue with the observed behavior quoted.
issues.notes: HITL — a grill requires the user. Covers PRD-001 story 10. Depends on EXEC-023 per Brooks's ruling 2026-06-07: the deviation catalog targets the final flat shape. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-4): six deviations from grill-with-docs's three reference files filed as EXEC-024…029; fork direction + glossary-format adoption ruled live by Brooks.

issues.title: Git init with per-repo personal identity
issues.description: git init the repo root, then immediately set repo-local user.name/user.email to the personal identity (brooksryan / brooksryan19@gmail.com) before any commit. Global git config (work) stays untouched. Per ADR-0001: nothing in this repo's history may carry the work identity. Acceptance: first commit authored under the personal identity; `git config user.email` inside the repo returns the personal address; global config unchanged.
issues.notes: HITL — mutating git op, Team Lead go required. Dependency ADR-0001 approved 2026-06-07 (satisfied). PRD-002 P1. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-6); identity ratified as-is by Brooks.

issues.title: GitHub repo created and pushed under brooksryan
issues.description: Create brooksryan/execution-set-up via gh with the personal account active (gh auth switch --user brooksryan before, switch back after — or scoped token), add origin, push default branch. Verified absent 2026-06-07. Acceptance: origin remote URL reads github.com/brooksryan/; no commit or push credential carries the work identity.
issues.notes: HITL. PRD-002 P2. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-7). Visibility superseded to PUBLIC by Brooks's direct ruling to packager ('repo can be public, nothing to hide'), flipped and verified 2026-06-07.

issues.title: npm account confirmation + name ruling
issues.description: Brooks logs into npm (interactive — user action, agents must not attempt); confirm the personal npm username; Team Lead confirms unscoped `to-execution` against the real username. Availability: registry 404 on to-execution, verified 2026-06-07 by Team Lead. Acceptance: `npm whoami` returns the confirmed personal user; unscoped name confirmed by Team Lead.
issues.notes: HITL. PRD-002 P3. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-8): npm whoami = brooksryan, re-verified twice, logged as npm_whoami_verified in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json; unscoped to-execution ruling approved with the rename.

issues.title: Publish preflight guards + manifest metadata
issues.description: Add `prepublishOnly` preflight to src/package.json asserting fail-closed: repo-local git email is personal, `npm whoami` is the confirmed personal user, origin remote is under brooksryan, working tree clean at a tagged commit. Add repository/author metadata. Src-First. Acceptance: inversion test — preflight run with wrong identity active aborts; package-qa PASS (mandatory — src/package.json change).
issues.notes: AFK. package-qa gate mandatory. PRD-002 P4. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-9): 6 fail-closed guards inversion-tested; third package_qa_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json.

issues.title: First publish 0.1.0
issues.description: Publish `to-execution` 0.1.0 to the public registry from a clean tagged tree, behind the EXEC-015 guards. Publish requires explicit Team Lead approval per packager constraints. Prompt execution matters: unscoped names are first-come, unreserved until first publish. Acceptance: `npx to-execution@latest init` in a scratch dir stamps a manifest identical to a local `node src/bin/cli.js init` run.
issues.notes: HITL — publish requires explicit Team Lead approval. PRD-002 P5. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-10): to-execution@0.1.0 on the registry, shasum verified; acceptance byte-identical; name reserved.

issues.title: Template restructure to .excn layout + src/ cross-reference sweep
issues.description: Restructure src/template to the .excn layout and sweep every src/ cross-reference to the new paths.
acceptance_criteria: src/template carries the full .excn layout incl. .excn/.gitignore (tmp/), .excn/adr/, .excn/research/, .excn/tmp/{sprints,issues,prds,retros}
template carries NO root instruction file (CLAUDE.md removed — pointer is CLI-owned per PRD-003 M1)
zero stale tmp/exec or old-path references in src/ docs and agent defs
package-qa rubric updated to the new manifest + nested-gitignore contract in the same change
alignment gate PASS
issues.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-11). All five acceptance criteria met; latent root-gitignore defect found and fixed in passing (retro-logged).

issues.title: CLI stamps .excn layout; ensureGitignore removed
issues.description: Point the CLI at the restructured template so init stamps the .excn layout, and remove the root-gitignore mutation path.
acceptance_criteria: init stamps the .excn layout verbatim from template
host root .gitignore never touched (nested .excn/.gitignore is template-stamped)
ensureGitignore() deleted
skip-safety + idempotency semantics unchanged
package-qa PASS against the slice-1 rubric
issues.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by packager (sprint_1 item S1-12); host root .gitignore sha256-proven untouched under plain and --force runs.

issues.title: CLI pointer-block append
issues.description: The CLI appends the framework pointer block to host instruction files non-destructively.
acceptance_criteria: appends to every existing file among {CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md}; creates both minimal pointer files if neither exists
visible-text sentinel, no HTML comments; second run appends nothing; user-deleted block re-appends
pointer files append-only under every flag including --force (host content byte-for-byte preserved)
warns without failing when post-append AGENTS.md exceeds 32 KiB
full inversion suite passes incl. no-trailing-newline and both-files cases
package-qa PASS against the slice-3-updated rubric
issues.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by packager (sprint_1 item S1-13): package-qa PASS 0 violations / 45 behavioral checks; commit 224a20b.

issues.title: Root Instance migration to .excn
issues.description: Migrate the root Instance to the .excn layout, preserving all work-tracking state.
acceptance_criteria: root methodology docs live in .excn/ and tmp/exec history moves to .excn/tmp/ with all sprint/issue/PRD/progress state intact
root CLAUDE.md replaced by the pointer block
ADR-0001 finalized into .excn/adr/0001-personal-ownership.md (packager authors, alignment-gated)
no orphaned old-path files at root
issues.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-14): alignment PASS entry 13; ADR-0001 placed by packager (e266892); state verified intact at new paths.

issues.title: Publish to-execution@0.2.0
issues.description: Publish the restructured package as to-execution@0.2.0 behind the EXEC-015 guards.
acceptance_criteria: all preflight guards green at publish
scratch npx stamp byte-identical to local
two scratch-host acceptance runs: pre-existing CLAUDE.md and pre-existing AGENTS.md, both non-destructively wired
Brooks's OTP/token step pre-arranged, not a surprise
issues.notes: npm 2FA HITL planned. Shipped 2026-06-07 by packager (sprint_1 item S1-15): published as 0.2.1 after acceptance test A caught the 0.2.0 nested-gitignore packaging defect; 0.2.0 deprecated on-registry.

issues.title: Flatten .excn — remove the tmp/ nesting
issues.description: Work-tracking loses its tmp/ level and lives flat in the namespace: .excn/{sprints,issues,prds,retros}/ plus progress JSONs at the .excn level. Rationale (Brooks): the .excn namespace already isolates the framework; the inner tmp/ is ceremony. Implementation rules and implements the new ignore semantics — the stamped .gitignore currently ignores tmp/ wholesale; the flat layout needs explicit entries or a ruling that work-tracking commits. Spans: template layout + stamped gitignore content, CLI manifest + pointer-block line, package-qa rubric co-update, path references (skill, agent defs, PROCESS, schema descriptions), root Instance migration with history intact, ADR-0002 contents-census amendment (dated note, no history rewrite), 0.2.2 publish.
acceptance_criteria: No tmp/ level inside .excn anywhere — template, CLI, docs, root Instance
Ignore semantics for the flat layout ruled and implemented
All state files migrated flat with history intact; schemas' description strings updated
package-qa PASS on the co-updated rubric; 0.2.2 published with registry acceptance (npx-vs-local byte-diff)
Zero stale .excn/tmp references in live docs
issues.notes: Team Lead directive (Brooks, 2026-06-07), filed without PRD; sequenced before EXEC-006 so the deviation catalog targets the final shape. AFK — publish is self-serve via the Keychain token. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-16): 0.2.2 registry-verified; ignore semantics ruled stay-ephemeral; first alignment FAIL→fix→PASS cycle ran on this slice.
